ORDER APPROVING PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT.

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-10-2022 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ESPINOZA'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. UNOPPOSED MOTION GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. CONSENT JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
